title: myrteola repens
intro: Myrteola repens, also known as New Caledonian peppermint, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Myrteola repens include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and acne. Herbal preparations of Myrteola repens include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties for topical or internal use.
